Setting up XML Sitemaps

This guide shows how to enable XML sitemaps for your site.

Step 1: Open the Sitemaps screen

From the dashboard, open the SEO menu and click Sitemaps.

  • Locate the General Sitemap section.
  • Toggle Enable Sitemap on.

Step 2: Save changes

Click the Save Changes button at the top right.
